dictionary_name: LocalPinyinIME self-maintained built-in common lexicon v2
intended_distribution: Bundled with LocalPinyinIME source and unsigned development packages as the project-maintained local_core dictionary layer.
source_policy: This v2 lexicon is project-maintained first-party content. This update did not import any third-party bulk lexicon, did not access the network, did not scrape web content, and did not use rime-ice, Sogou, Baidu, Microsoft, Google, public GitHub dictionary data, or other external dictionary files.
frequency_policy: Frequency values are project-maintained relative ranking weights using coarse bands such as 9000, 7000, 5000, and 3000. They are not internet frequency, search frequency, commercial IME frequency, or external corpus statistics.
review_status: approved for development release after format, duplicate-key, category, and benchmark validation; entries are first-party curated but have not all received formal linguistic review
